description: Learn how to store food safely to prevent spoilage and foodborne illnesses.

steps.instruction: Always refrigerate perishable items within 2 hours of cooking.
Use airtight containers to keep food fresh.
Label containers with dates to track freshness.
Follow the 'first in, first out' rule when using stored food.

safety_tips: Check for signs of spoilage before consuming stored food.
Keep raw and cooked foods separate to avoid cross-contamination.
